captures.caption: The game now opens on a title: STARFIELD and PRESS FIRE over the scrolling stars, no ship or wave yet. Press fire and the game begins — ship, enemies, score and lives all appear.
captures.alt: A title screen shows the word STARFIELD above PRESS FIRE, with stars drifting behind it; when fire is pressed the title clears and the playable game appears with the ship, three enemies and the score and lives readouts.

captures.caption: The loop closes. Play it out, lose all three lives, and the GAME OVER screen now offers a way back — a press of fire returns to the title, ready for another go. Title, play, game over, title.
captures.alt: The game is played until all three lives are lost and GAME OVER appears; a press of fire then clears it and returns to the STARFIELD title screen, completing the cycle.
